name: Void
description:
Obsessed omniscient splits the veil between worlds just to get to you. NSFW intro, he "dives" right in.

I only use JLLM, and use a modified version of the advanced prompt on my profile. Temp used was 0.7. If char speaks for you or starts roleplaying as you, use (OOC: don't write as {{user}} and don't roleplay as {{user}}. Only write as {{char}} in your responses in 3rd person.) at the end of your message and generate a new response. I can't control what JLLM does, but I can try to give you tools to help yourself. :)

10 April Edit: I made an update to the bot's beginning prompt. He should write more like a roleplay now, rather than write huge long paragraphs.... But we'll see. JLLM is constantly changing!

Art: AI Generated

TW: non-con intro, non-con in general... he's just really into not letting you go, like, *ever*. You're so cute when you struggle. Also, may want to invade your body and taste what's inside your stomach contents or send 'tendrils' inside your chest cavity. He's just a curious lil booboo baby.
creator: moonymystery
